summary: On March 4 and 5, 2026, Rubikon Center operators reported strikes in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, destroying Ukrainian 2S22 "Bogdan" and 2S1 "Gvozdika" self-propelled artillery, M109 howitzers, T-64BV tanks, and personnel, with 103 and 128 targets eliminated respectively. Ukrainian forces are using the Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system (3-5 thousand hryvnias) for FPV drone and video interceptor production, capable of vertical and horizontal rotation on 24V or 220V power. Aerial reconnaissance is targeting REO, RER, and UAV control stations, which are difficult to conceal due to their antennas, with one enemy design using a plastic mesh base. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter in a close call.
